zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Vaux於1488年4月出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 哈洛登時，她的父親Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden29歲，母親Elizabeth FitzHugh34歲。她於1512年與Sir George Throckmorton在英國結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1571年4月14日在英國瓦維其可爾阿爾斯特享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾庫頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Vaux于1488年4月出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 哈洛登时，她的父亲Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden29岁，母亲Elizabeth FitzHugh34岁。她于1512年与Sir George Throckmorton在英国结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1571年4月14日在英国瓦維其可爾阿爾斯特享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾庫頓。

nameMeanings.name: Vaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of various places in northern France called Vaux, from the Old French plural of val ‘valley’. Compare English Vause and French Devaux .

History: Richard Vaux (1749–90) emigrated from Sussex, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in early youth. Calvert Vaux, landscape architect, emigrated from London, England, to America in 1850 and designed several major US parks, including Central Park in New York City (with Frederick Olmstead). — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variant Veaux and altered form Devoe ) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vause
meanings: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Vaux (see Vaux ), a common French placename, singular and plural of val ‘valley’, the plural form being Latinized in surnames as de Vallibus. Norman lords with this surname are recorded in 12th- and early 13th-century records in Cumberland (Irthington), Devon (Farwood, in Colyton), East Yorkshire (Warter), Essex (Belchamp), and Leicestershire (Belvoir). Compare Vale .

nickname perhaps from Middle English fals, faus, vaus (Old French fals, faus, Old English fals) ‘deceitful, disloyal, dishonest, mendacious’, but it is more likely the name arises from 1, with the common Anglo-Norman French substitution of le for de in their surname.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Vaux was born in April 1488, in Great Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth FitzHugh, was 34. She married Sir George Throckmorton in 1512, in England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 14 April 1571, in Alcester, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 83, and was buried in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Vaux est née en avril 1488, à Great Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth FitzHugh, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Throckmorton en 1512, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 avril 1571, à Alcester, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Vaux im April 1488 in Great Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden 29 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth FitzHugh 34. Sie hat 1512 in England Sir George Throckmorton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. April 1571 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Alcester, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Vaux è nata il nel aprile 1488 nel Great Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth FitzHugh, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir George Throckmorton nel 1512, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 14 aprile 1571, nel Alcester, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Coughton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Vauxが1488年4月にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアト ハーロウデンで生まれた時，父Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowdenは29歳，母Elizabeth FitzHughは34歳であった。1512年にイギリスでSir George Throckmortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1571年4月14日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアルセスターで83歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Vaux(이)가 1488년 4월 영국 노르섬프토실르 그리트 해로우든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth FitzHugh(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1512년 영국에서 Sir George Throckmorton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1571년 4월 14일 영국 워윅실르 알스스터에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 코우그h턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Vaux nasceu em abril de 1488, em Great Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth FitzHugh, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir George Throckmorton em 1512, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de abril de 1571, em Alcester, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Vaux родилась апрель 1488 г. в местности грит харроуден, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth FitzHugh, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Throckmorton в 1512 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 14 апреля 1571 г. в местности алсестир, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Vaux nació en abril de 1488, en Great Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Vaux, 1st Baron Vaux of Harrowden, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth FitzHugh, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Sir George Throckmorton en 1512, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 14 de abril de 1571, en Alcester, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
